task_description: Implement live ranking system, realtime fantasy points, match detail tabs (Contests/Scorecard/My Team), live scorecard integration, full realtime subscriptions on all tables, database SQL for missing tables, and Dream11-style team preview screen.

verification.summary: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox. Manual code review verified: all imports reference existing files, all color/spacing/typography constants exist in the theme, model patterns match existing conventions exactly, realtime subscription pattern matches existing working code, no syntax issues detected.
